name: mcp-server-aws-git-search
description: Semantic search and analysis of Git repositories using Amazon Bedrock and FAISS

rating.reason: The toolset demonstrates good documentation quality overall. Tool names are clear and descriptive, indicating their purpose well (create_research_repository, search_research_repository, etc.). Descriptions are comprehensive, providing 2-4 sentences that explain functionality, usage context, and key details like the use of FAISS indexing and Amazon Bedrock embeddings. Parameter documentation is thorough with clear descriptions, appropriate defaults, and helpful examples. Minor areas for improvement include some redundancy in descriptions and the access_file tool could benefit from clearer organization of its multi-purpose functionality, but these don't significantly impact usability.
